input.command:
cd /home/nick/work/picolibc_agentic && git add libm/machine/riscv/test/ && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
test: add test_random_300 sweep to all libm test files

Adds a 300-point evenly spaced input sweep over the primary domain of
each function, increasing test coverage for accuracy comparisons between
opt and ref builds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
